name: Forum
description: Discussion forum: categories/boards, topics, and FLAT replies -- a port of a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo. Public read on all three collections; owner writes their own categories/topics/replies (row_filter owner_id=$user_id). The topic permalink /forum/topics/{topic_id:uuid} is a seeded 59 detail view (site_view_render): a composed page of three generic block renderers -- an editable+deletable `detail` block (topic; ai_summary shows only when is_ai_summarized via the field's visible_when), a `related` block (flat replies by topic_id -- deliberately flat, not nested), and a `form` block with fixed:{topic_id:$record_id} (reply compose, FK locked to the page's topic). No bespoke per-topic page. Moderation is the flags themselves (is_pinned/is_locked/is_solved on a topic, is_solution on a reply), edited via the detail block's owner edit form. Deferred (fields carried, behavior not): AI topic summaries (no generation built here), topic view-count incrementing, cross-user moderation (needs a moderator-role rule this package does not define), and category slug auto-generation.
